description_long: This is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, pointed blade made of dark metal, featuring subtle patterns or etchings along its length. The crossguard is simple yet functional, extending horizontally with small rounded ends, providing hand protection. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a dark material, possibly leather, and ends in a rounded pommel with a geometric design. The overall design is reminiscent of medieval European longswords, with a focus on both utility and a touch of elegance. The blade appears robust and well-balanced, suitable for both cutting and thrusting. The color palette is dominated by dark metallic tones with hints of deep red or brown on the handle.
description: A dark, double-edged medieval-style sword with a straight blade, crossguard, and a wrapped handle ending in a rounded pommel.
description_view_0: A narrow, edge-on view showing the thin profile of the blade and handle.
description_view_1: A full frontal view displaying the straight blade, crossguard, and detailed handle with pommel.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, mirroring view 0, highlighting the slimness of the blade.
description_view_3: A rear view similar to the front, showing the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, wrapped, rounded pommel, dark color
